passedAssertions.notes: Guest isolation architecturally verified. Host services bind to 127.0.0.1 only. Guests use isolated /30 subnets with only tap IP (172.X.0.1) as gateway. No network path from guest to host control-plane surfaces.
Provider secrets confirmed absent from guest. Host-side credentials at /var/lib/go-choir/gateway-provider.env never pass to guest. Guest rootfs contains only sandbox binary and minimal utilities.

failedAssertions.reason: End-to-end flow blocked: VM guest fails to boot - missing /bin/init in rootfs.ext4. Kernel boots successfully (VIRTIO_MMIO_CMDLINE_DEVICES fixed), but guest panics with 'Requested init /bin/init failed (error -2)'. Proxy cannot connect to per-user VM sandbox at 127.0.0.1:9001.
failedAssertions.previousIssue: VM guest kernel panic due to missing VIRTIO_MMIO_CMDLINE_DEVICES=y - this is now FIXED

failedAssertions.reason: VM guest fails to boot - missing /bin/init in rootfs. Concurrent request collapsing mechanism WORKS CORRECTLY (verified: two simultaneous requests collapsed to one VM), but VM health prevents end-to-end verification.
failedAssertions.previousIssue: VM guest kernel panic due to missing VIRTIO_MMIO_CMDLINE_DEVICES=y - this is now FIXED
failedAssertions.mechanismVerified: Concurrent request collapsing works correctly - only one VM created for concurrent requests

appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-VM-007 and VAL-VM-011 to passed, updated VAL-GATEWAY-001 and VAL-VM-004 with new root cause (missing /bin/init instead of kernel panic)

fixedFromRound2: Kernel config VIRTIO_MMIO_CMDLINE_DEVICES=y is now present - kernel boots successfully
Previous kernel panic 'VFS: Unable to mount root fs' is RESOLVED
newBlocker: Guest rootfs missing /bin/init - kernel boots but cannot start init process
Root cause: guest image build not including sandbox binary at /bin/init in rootfs.ext4

symptoms: Firecracker VM starts and kernel loads
Proxy cannot connect to sandbox port 9001 - no process listening
VM ownership created but VM cannot serve traffic
observed: Kernel boot log shows successful virtio-mmio device initialization (fixed)
Guest init script at /bin/init is missing or not executable
Sandbox binary not present in guest rootfs
rootCauseAnalysis.fixRequired: Rebuild guest rootfs image to include sandbox binary at /bin/init. The nix/guest-image.nix guestRootfsBuildScript or guestRootSetupScript may not be correctly copying the sandbox binary into the debugfs-populated rootfs.

notes: Round 3: Kernel boot issue FIXED (VIRTIO_MMIO_CMDLINE_DEVICES=y now present)

VM concurrent request handling verified working - only one VM created for concurrent requests
